svg.text: BM25 keyword index · JSON persistence · rotating logs (10 MB)
Injected as context in every prompt
diff hunk → full file → RAG chunks → codebase summary
Token budget: ~8 K file · ~1.5 K output · history truncation
Role: mentor · explains why · 2-4 approaches · honest tradeoffs
API Routes → content.js: SSE text_delta stream
background.js → API Routes: GET /health (30s health ping)
GitHub Client → GitHub REST API v3: HTTPS · PAT Bearer auth
Claude Client → Anthropic Claude API: HTTPS POST /v1/messages (SSE)
BM25 Indexer → BM25 Index Store: JSON chunk writes to disk
